purpose: A single tab within an IconTabBar. Holds the tab label, optional icon, count badge, and selected state.
whenToUse: For each tab in the bar
whenNotToUse: For navigation across pages — use SideNavigation
doRules: Show count in parens for tab badges like "Artifacts (2)"
Use design=Vertical for label-only tabs; Horizontal for icon+label
dontRules: Do not change tab label text via direct injection — use text property
Do not nest IconTabFilter inside IconTabFilter

layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width by label; height matches IconTabBar.

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Selected state shown by color AND underline

exceptions: IconTabSeparator for visual grouping between tabs
